parameters.query:
insert into runrun_analytics.f_task_events (
    raw_id,
    sk_task,
    sk_board,
    performer_id,
    event_type,
    happened_at,
    event_date,
    created_at
)
select
    t.raw_id,
    dt.sk_task,
    db.sk_board,
    t.performer_id,
    t.event_type,
    t.happened_at,
    t.happened_at::date,
    t.created_at
from runrun_staging.task_events t
join runrun_analytics.dim_tasks dt
    on dt.task_id = t.task_id
left join runrun_analytics.dim_boards db
    on db.board_id = dt.board_id
on conflict (raw_id) do nothing;

insert into runrun_analytics.dim_users (
    user_id,
    name,
    email,
    position,
    is_manager,
    on_vacation,
    extracted_at
)
select
    id,
    name,
    email,
    position,
    is_manager,
    on_vacation,
    extracted_at
from runrun_staging.users
on conflict (user_id) do update
set
    name = excluded.name,
    email = excluded.email,
    position = excluded.position,
    is_manager = excluded.is_manager,
    on_vacation = excluded.on_vacation,
    extracted_at = excluded.extracted_at
where runrun_analytics.dim_users.extracted_at < excluded.extracted_at;

insert into runrun_analytics.task_current_state (
    task_id,
    performer_id,
    current_status,
    happened_at,
    updated_at,
    title,
    board_name
)
select
    t.task_id,
    t.performer_id,
    t.event_type,
    t.happened_at,
    now(),
    t.title,
    b.name
from (
    select *,
           row_number() over (
               partition by task_id
               order by happened_at desc, raw_id desc
           ) as rn
    from runrun_staging.task_events
) t
left join runrun_staging.boards b
    on b.id = t.board_id
where rn = 1
on conflict (task_id) do update
set
    performer_id = excluded.performer_id,
    current_status = excluded.current_status,
    happened_at = excluded.happened_at,
    updated_at = now(),
    title = excluded.title,
    board_name = excluded.board_name;

insert into runrun_analytics.dim_boards (
    board_id,
    board_name,
    extracted_at
)
select
    id,
    name,
    _airbyte_extracted_at
from runrun_raw.boards
on conflict (board_id) do update
set
    board_name = excluded.board_name,
    extracted_at = excluded.extracted_at
where runrun_analytics.dim_boards.extracted_at < excluded.extracted_at;

insert into runrun_analytics.dim_tasks (
    task_id,
    title,
    board_id,
    extracted_at
)
select
    task_id,
    title,
    board_id,
    max(created_at)
from runrun_staging.task_events
group by task_id, title, board_id
on conflict (task_id) do update
set
    title = excluded.title,
    board_id = excluded.board_id,
    extracted_at = excluded.extracted_at;
